title: Making a Presentation 课堂演讲

lines.en: Good morning, everyone. Today Lily is going to give us a presentation.
lines.zh: 大家早上好。今天Lily要给我们做一个小演讲。

lines.en: Good morning, classmates. My topic today is my favorite hobby, reading.
lines.zh: 同学们早上好。我今天的话题是我最喜欢的爱好——阅读。

lines.en: I read for about thirty minutes every day before bed.
lines.zh: 我每天睡前大约看三十分钟的书。

lines.en: My favorite book is "Charlotte's Web". It is a story about friendship.
lines.zh: 我最喜欢的书是《夏洛的网》。这是一个关于友谊的故事。

lines.en: Reading helps me learn new words and improves my writing skills.
lines.zh: 阅读帮助我学习新单词，也提高了我的写作能力。

lines.en: I also like reading because books take me to different places without leaving home.
lines.zh: 我也喜欢阅读，因为书能让我足不出户就去到不同的地方。

lines.en: Thank you for listening. Does anyone have questions?
lines.zh: 感谢大家的聆听。有人有问题吗？

lines.en: Great job, Lily! You spoke clearly and loudly. I am proud of you.
lines.zh: 做得很好，Lily！你说得很清楚，声音也很响亮。我为你感到骄傲。
